<!-- generated by setup-repository-workflow -->
# Review context

Every fixed-point reviewer receives the complete decision context, not an unbounded repository dump:

1. requested result and authoritative acceptance/spec;
2. fixed base/head revision, commit list, diff, and complete changed-path ledger;
3. closest applicable instructions plus only durable domain/ADR material relevant to the changed boundary;
4. exact focused proof commands, results, known gaps, and generated paths;
5. authority and publication state, explicit non-goals, and what current evidence does not prove;
6. separate Standards and Spec questions.

Put a transient context manifest below the configured `working_runs` root. Persist a final review only when a named consumer needs it, below `retained_reports/code-review/`. Review remains read-only; a parent workflow performs any later persistence or repair.
